{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Jai clan Goldsign
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Goldsign]] of the [[Jai clan]] consists of metal wire appearing as white hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
